headline: Is Carnival Corporation & plc (CCL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CCL a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Carnival Corporation & plc on Investomine’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CCL. Carnival Corporation & plc’s share was trading at $26.39 as of March 9th. CCL’s trailing and forward P/E were 12.77 and 10.14, respectively according to Yahoo […]
